projects.title: Folder Icons
projects.author: Dminx
projects.desc: Right-click any folder in the Unity Project window to assign a custom color or icon. GUID-based persistence, zero runtime cost, easily import.

projects.title: Unity Refresh Inspector Fix
projects.author: Dminx
projects.desc: This tool will fix an issue that is causing the inspector to not show which object or file you selected in the Unity Editor. Unity Version 6.3. This  works on Cosmic OS, it may work on other operating systems potentially.
